title: What's new in Cloud Run
summary: Google Cloud announced new Cloud Run capabilities designed for deploying AI agent applications and inference workloads with improved scalability and reduced operational overhead. The platform introduces serverless features that address the deployment needs of AI-driven development.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through new Cloud Run capabilities aimed at deploying AI agent applications and inference workloads. It matters because it targets the serverless deployment needs of AI-driven development, with a focus on improved scalability and reduced operational overhead. The key takeaways center on running agent applications and inference on a serverless platform, covering edge deployment and local inference.
